revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-7-035

A transformer designed to maintain the current in the secondary circuit within narrowly defined limits, whatever may be the variations of the impedance of the secondary circuit or the variations of the voltage applied to the primary circuit.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Constant-current transformer}}
